CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel London Breed To Appear And Testify At Hearings And To Produce Documents And For Oral Deposition Pursuant To California Civil Procedure 1987.1, 2020.010, And 2025.450-2025.480
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ameer Flippin 415-792-8993 Plaintiff in Pro Per
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. The Court admonishes Mr. Flippin. The Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1. PLAINTIFF AMEER FLIPPIN'S Motion For Order Compelling Subpoena Of Respondent London Breed To Appear And To Testify At Hearings And To Produce Documents And For Oral Depositions Pursuant To California Civil Procedure 19871.1, 2020,010, and 2025.450-2025.480.

Off calendar as untimely filed per CCP 1005.

Visiting Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)

Motion For Order Compelling Subpoena Of Respondent London Breed To Appear And To Testify At Hearings And To Produce Documents
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Ameer Flippin 415-792-8993 Plaintiff in Pro Per
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. The Court admonishes Mr. Flippin. The Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2. Motion For Compelling Subpoena of Respondent London Breed To Appear An to Testiy At Hearing And Produce Documents.

Off calendar as untimely filed per CCP 1005.

Visiting Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ameer Flippin, 415-792-8993 Plaintiff In Pro Per.
Tara Steeley Esq. 415-554-4700 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.
Court reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR #7062, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com, Reported. (via Zoom)

ARGUED. Defense counsel Ms. Steeley contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments - did not meet requirements for a subpoena. The Court shares its comments. Plaintiff Mr. Flippin presents arguments briefly.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS "CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO", LONDON BREED DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

London Breed and the City and County of San Francisco's demurrer, to which no opposition was filed, is OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR #7062, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
